title: Xenial Smoky Middle Eastern Renkon Lotus Root Tagine
description: A hearty and aromatic solo dinner dish featuring renkon lotus root in a rich and smoky Middle Eastern tagine sauce, made in a Dutch oven.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in the Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the smoked paprika, ground cumin, ground coriander, salt, and black pepper, and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the cubed renkon lotus root and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the chopped fresh parsley, lemon juice, and vegetable broth, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Remove the lid and simmer for an additional 10 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened and the lotus root is tender.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
Let the dish rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve alone as a solo dinner.
